title: Only print heading once for `buildah images`
body:
The current buildah images command prints the heading twice, this
bug was introduced when --json flag was added.

Signed-off-by: Dan Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, looks alright when I run it, too.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/f4a5511e837c9ddd0e5c3d2fb57c9926dff5abc7.1500324364841194240/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing f4a5511e837c9ddd0e5c3d2fb57c9926dff5abc7 to master...
